core_mechanism: autocatalytic positive-feedback amplification of an infinitesimal symmetry-breaking bias into a macroscopic ordered state, modeled as noise-driven bistable stochastic dynamics (an Ito stochastic differential equation) whose weak deterministic tilt selects one of two otherwise-degenerate mirror states
brief_reason: The abstract describes a weak directional bias between two mirror configurations being amplified by autocatalysis and stochastic fluctuations, with the resulting probability distribution of an asymmetry order parameter obtained from Ito stochastic equations.
